state.next-action:
Session 2026-04-16d CLOSE. TRACK 1 advanced across 3 commits in submodule + 1 bump in outer repo (pushed): - 65ddd91: nav-shared + PlayableTeaser home vocab + TS fix (EvalProjectMeta.published optional) - f3ade4b: docs/quick-start.md (v1.32→1.33 + new CLI canonical shape gad projects init / gad species create / gad spawn / gad generation) - 8c1234x (this session final): /downloads metadata + Templates intro/section vocab rebrand (eval project → species)
Outer repo bump: 5b12b3a (pushed).
Parallel commits on submodule during session (not mine, from user's agent-experiment work): 504f691 gad bundle export command, 8591d71 OpenCode permissions simplification. No conflicts.
3 new todos captured from session design discussion: - site-article-parallel-subagent-cost (cost breakdown → landing article) - structural-parallelism-task-outbox (per-agent scratch files, avoid shared-file merge conflicts) - lightweight-agent-and-scoped-snapshot (agent profiles, gad snapshot --task, minimal-agent mode)
COMPLETED this session (additional): - TRACK 1 finish: task 45-15 DONE (vocabulary audit across all live user-facing surfaces). /how-it-works verified already clean. Residual "eval" is in generated data files from historical decision/task text — intentional preservation. - TRACK 3 partial: `gad breed` CLI command shipped (decision gad-219). breedSpecies() added to lib/eval-data-access.cjs with union-and-shed merge semantics. Top-level gad breed subcommand registered. Manual verification: bred bare + emergent on escape-the-dungeon → correct species.json (workflow=bare precedence, constraints merged, bredFrom tracked, dna/installedSkills dedup ready). Test species archived+deleted after verification. - Session dump heuristics note captured: .planning/notes/session-dump-heuristics-2026-04-16.md (operator question about when to restart — rules of thumb + proposed profile modes senior/balanced/junior).
REMAINING — still planned (next session):
TRACK 3 continued: pressure formula display on /how-it-works (the second half of TRACK 3 — formula visible on site).
TRACK 2 (VCS portability): Run `gad spawn escape-the-dungeon/vcs-test`. Compare bare data-attributes vs React component. Iterate VCS skill. STOP after: one generation complete + skill iterated.
TRACK 3 (formula display): `gad breed` DONE (this session). Remaining: refine pressure formula display on /how-it-works — show formula, dimensions, current values.
STRUCTURAL INVESTIGATIONS (not decided, captured as todos): - Per-agent task outbox pattern — avoid shared-file merge conflicts (structural-parallelism-task-outbox) - Scoped snapshot + lightweight agent profile — drop subagent cold-start cost (lightweight-agent-and-scoped-snapshot) - Landing-site article on parallel-subagent cost (site-article-parallel-subagent-cost)
